message:
feat(raptorq): add source equation generation and simplify GF(256) ops

Decoder additions (decoder.rs):
- Add all_source_equations() to generate LT constraint equations for
  all K source symbols matching the encoder's systematic structure
- Add source_equation(esi) for retrieving a specific source equation
- Add make_received_source() test helper for proper LT-based received
  symbol construction

GF(256) simplification (gf256.rs):
- Simplify gf256_addmul_slice by replacing branchless arithmetic with
  a simple conditional branch
- Removes complexity without measured performance regression; the
  branch predictor handles the common case (nonzero values) well

Systematic encoder fix (systematic.rs):
- Remove extra LT connections from build_lt_rows that broke the
  systematic property (intermediate[i] should equal source[i])
- Redundancy now comes purely from LDPC/HDPC constraints as intended
- Mark seed parameter as unused (_seed) since LT rows are now identity

Tests update (tests.rs):
- Adapt tests to use new source equation helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
